name: Leek and Potato Soup (Barry's Best)
recipeInstructions:
IMPORTANT - Do not use baking potatoes. Use only thin-skinned white or Red Bliss potatoes.
Mince the leeks and onion finely.
Saute the leeks and onion in butter in a large soup pot until soft.
Slice the potatoes very thin.
Add the sliced potatoes and chicken stock to the soup pot and cook over medium-high heat until the potatoes are fully cooked and soft (approximately 30 minutes).
Let the mixture cool.
Puree the potato and broth mixture in batches using a food processor or blender until smooth.
Return the pureed mixture to the soup pot, add milk and cream, and bring to a boil.
Serve and enjoy.
This recipe makes about 8 quarts of soup. The soup freezes exceptionally well.
